## 2026-06-12 19:55 – PR #699 CI follow-up for PageBaselineStore tests
Context: After the Sonar cleanup push, GitHub Unit Tests failed twice on PR #699: first from stale test call sites after the `RefreshExistingBaseline` signature change, then from Windows-only path separator assertions in `PageBaselineStoreTests`.
Decision: Updated `PageBaselineStoreTests` to build `PageBaselineInfo` inputs explicitly for refresh calls and switched the two `ResolveMetaFilePath` expectations to use `MockFileSystem.Path.Combine(...)` so the assertions are path-separator agnostic across Unix and Windows runners.
Discovery: The initial local `--no-build` test rerun masked the compile failure in CI; the reliable local gate for this area is `dotnet test clio.tests/clio.tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~PageBaselineStoreTests"` plus the broader `dotnet test clio.tests/clio.tests.csproj --filter "Category=Unit&(Module=Command|Module=McpServer)"`.
Files: clio.tests/Command/McpServer/PageBaselineStoreTests.cs, .codex/workspace-diary.md
Impact: The PR’s test fixture now matches the production refactor and no longer bakes Unix-style paths into assertions, which should stabilize the Windows GitHub runner.

## 2026-06-12 20:35 – update-page Designer Presence push without cliogate
Context: Needed `update-page` saves from clio/MCP to trigger the same live "page changed" popup that Creatio designers see, but without adding any `cliogate` endpoint and without changes in `creatio-core` or `creatio-ui`.
Decision: Added an internal `IPageDesignerPresenceNotifier` on the successful non-dry-run `PageUpdateCommand` path, guarded by an internal `NotifyDesignerPresence` flag so only dedicated `update-page` entry points opt in. The notifier reuses browser-session auth, reads `GetApplicationInfo` + `GetCurrentUserInfo`, chooses WebSocket vs SignalR from `clientConnectionClassName`, and publishes the exact `DesignerPresence` server envelope as a best-effort follow-up. Failures and skips stay fail-open and surface only as response warnings. `sync-pages` explicitly keeps the flag off in v1.
Discovery: (1) The designer popup is not driven by `ChangedSchema`; it comes from a message-channel broadcast with `Sender="DesignerPresence"` and a JSON-string body. (2) `Creatio.Client` can listen but not send, so clio needs its own message-channel publishers. (3) DI auto-registration tried to resolve the low-level SignalR wrapper directly and broke the full unit suite; excluding `IMessageChannelHubConnection` from assembly auto-registration fixed container validation. (4) The new MCP E2E compiles and the scenario is wired, but the live run currently self-skips because sandbox `d2` is unreachable from this machine.
Files: clio/Command/PageDesignerPresence/PageDesignerPresenceNotifier.cs, clio/Command/PageUpdateOptions.cs, clio/BindingsModule.cs, clio/Command/McpServer/Tools/PageUpdateTool.cs, clio/Command/McpServer/Tools/PageSyncTool.cs, clio/Common/CreatioServicePaths.cs, clio.tests/Command/PageUpdateCommandDesignerPresenceTests.cs, clio.tests/Command/PageDesignerPresenceNotifierTests.cs, clio.tests/Command/PageDesignerPresencePublishersTests.cs, clio.mcp.e2e/PageUpdateToolE2ETests.cs, clio/docs/commands/update-page.md, clio/help/en/update-page.txt, clio/Commands.md, spec/prd/spec-update-page-designer-presence-push.md, spec/adr/adr-update-page-designer-presence-push.md, spec/stories/story-update-page-designer-presence-push-1.md, spec/test-plans/tp-update-page-designer-presence-push.md, spec/sprint-status.yaml
Impact: `update-page` now behaves much closer to the native designer save flow for active collaborators while preserving save success in OAuth-only or otherwise unsupported environments; the contract is documented and covered by unit tests plus a gated live E2E probe.

## 2026-06-15 08:30 – ENG-91317 PR #699 review close-out (drive-pr-green)
Context: b-horodyskyi CHANGES_REQUESTED on the checksum-conflict + Designer Presence PR; drove it back to green.
Decision: Fixed 4 Major findings — (1) bounded 5s CTS around the whole notify chain instead of CancellationToken.None; (2) host-match + scheme/no-downgrade validation in ResolveServiceUrl before attaching forms-auth cookies; (3) sanitize ex.Message (type-only) in all fail-open warnings/logs; (4) centralized identity carry-forward in PageBaselineStore.MergeEnvironmentIdentity so name-only sync refresh no longer strips a URI-mode EnvironmentUri. Plus Minors: null-checksum fail-open in TryCheckForExternalModification; sync-over-async XML doc.
Discovery: Extracting the timeout try/catch re-tripped S3776 (complexity 17) — split out TryAcquireCookiesAsync + TryResolveServiceUrl. In conflict tests, FindExistingSchemaInPackage's SelectQuery is caught by the broad non-"byUId" stub, so a "byPackage"→empty stub is required to force IsCreateReplacing=true.
Files: clio/Command/PageDesignerPresence/PageDesignerPresenceNotifier.cs, IPageDesignerPresenceNotifier.cs, clio/Command/McpServer/Tools/PageBaselineStore.cs, PageSyncTool.cs, clio/Command/PageUpdateOptions.cs, clio.tests/Command/PageDesignerPresenceNotifierTests.cs, PageUpdateCommandConflictTests.cs, clio.tests/Command/McpServer/PageBaselineStoreTests.cs
Impact: All CI green, Sonar 0 issues/gate OK, MERGEABLE/CLEAN. MCP+docs reviewed, no update required (internal runtime hardening only). Commits f84c447c, e4b3ff95. Re-requested b-horodyskyi review.

## 2026-06-12 – BMAD pipeline for ENG-91318 (read-column-default-values)
Context: Jira ENG-91318 (epic ENG-85256) asks how the agent reads default column values and whether to adopt the OData approach used by other teams; ran full BMAD pipeline in facilitator mode with adversarial review on the PRD.
Decision: Two-phase architecture — Phase A is a pure investigation (empty production-code diff) using `call-service` GET `odata/$metadata` via IApplicationClient as the probe, scoring keep/adopt/hybrid against pre-committed criteria D1–D7; Phase B (gated on story-4 decision) keeps the designer-service read backbone and enriches readback with `display-value`/`record-resolution` fail-soft markers plus Const-GUID write validation.
Discovery: Clio reads defaults via EntitySchemaDesignerService.svc/GetSchemaDesignItem, not OData; clio OData tools never touch `$metadata`; CSDL DefaultValue exists only on primitive properties, so `$metadata` structurally cannot carry lookup display values — the OData-only alternative cannot satisfy the machine-verifiable readback predicate by itself. Lookup Const defaults today require a raw unvalidated GUID on write and return GUID-only on read.
Files: spec/prd/prd-read-column-default-values.md, spec/adr/adr-read-column-default-values.md, spec/stories/story-read-column-default-values-1..8.md, spec/sprint-status.yaml, spec/test-plans/tp-read-column-default-values.md
Impact: Stories 1–5 (investigation) are ready-for-dev with a dependency graph 1∥2→3→4→5; stories 6–8 are deferred behind the story-4 gap decision; test plan flags MCP E2E as manual-only before any Phase B merge.

## 2026-06-13 23:55 – Execute ENG-91318 Phase A investigation (stories 1–5) with live evidence
Context: Ran the read-column-default-values Phase A investigation end to end and recorded decision-grade evidence; live env work done on studio0614 (.NET Framework 8.x) after dev04 went down mid-compile and the VPN dropped.
Decision: Confirmed HYBRID (ADR Option B) — keep EntitySchemaDesignerService readback, enrich display value in clio via the OData *data* endpoint (SelectQuery fallback), enrichment default-on/fail-soft. OData `$metadata` rejected on evidence. ADR Status → Accepted; Phase B gate opened (stories 6–8 ready-for-dev). Posted the decision to ENG-91318 (comment 453172).
Discovery: (1) CSDL `$metadata` carries ZERO `DefaultValue` facets for ANY column (0 in 1.43 MB) — stronger than the ADR's "primitive-only" prediction; OData metadata is wholly unusable for defaults. (2) Live E2E: lookup-`Const` readback returns source+GUID+reference-schema but NO display value → predicate FAIL on component (d); BUT runtime correctly auto-applies the `Const` default on insert (UsrColorId set without being supplied) → A-02 cleared, FR-06 stays Should. (3) Persisted `defValue.Value` is a plain GUID, not structured → A-04 false, resolver required. (4) `clio call-service` (the ADR-prescribed probe vehicle) is BROKEN in clio 8.1.0.58 on appsettings with duplicate env URIs: `.Single()` → "Sequence contains more than one matching element", even with explicit -u/-l/-p; used an authenticated curl fallback (zero production code). (5) `create-lookup`/`create-entity-schema` auto-publish throws a server NRE on these instances (dataforge maintenance `baseUri Value cannot be null`); schema saves to metadata but needs a full `compile-creatio` (~10 min, restarts app) to materialize in runtime. (6) compile-creatio restarts the app, leaving it briefly unreachable.
Files: spec/read-column-default-values/{read-column-default-values-current-path,read-column-default-values-odata-probe,read-column-default-values-e2e-scenario,read-column-default-values-comparison}.md, spec/adr/adr-read-column-default-values.md (Status→Accepted + Decision outcome section), spec/sprint-status.yaml (stories 1–5 done, 6–8 gate opened)
Impact: ENG-91318 investigation closed with reusable evidence; Phase B can start once OQ-06 (display-value culture/imageLookup) is answered. Two follow-ups: (a) clean the orphan unpublished UsrEng91318Color on dev04 once that app recovers; (b) file a separate clio bug for call-service duplicate-URI `.Single()` failure.

## 2026-06-14 00:50 – Implement ENG-91318 Phase B (stories 6-8): lookup-default readback enrichment + write validation
Context: User approved proceeding to Phase B; implemented all three conditional stories with code + tests + MCP + docs + E2E.
Decision: Readback enrichment via a new `ILookupDefaultDisplayValueResolver` (SelectQuery transport through `IApplicationClient`, display column from `IRuntimeEntitySchemaReader.PrimaryDisplayColumnName`), additive `display-value`/`record-resolution` init fields on `EntitySchemaDefaultValueConfig` (+`WithDisplay` copy method), enrichment gated to Const+lookup in `RemoteEntitySchemaColumnManager.GetColumnProperties`, fully fail-soft. Write validation via a Const branch in `EntitySchemaDefaultValueSourceResolver.Resolve(+referenceSchemaName)` backed by a new `IRemoteEntitySchemaDesignerClient.CheckRecordExists` (returns Exists/NotFound/Unknown; Unknown never blocks). Resolver chose SelectQuery (always-available, module precedent) over the ADR's nominal OData-data primary — both valid behind the interface; recorded in comparison D7.
Discovery: clio DI uses convention auto-registration (`BindingsModule.RegisterAssemblyInterfaceTypes`, ~line 709) for every `Clio.*` `I*` interface, so the new resolver needed NO explicit registration. `RemoteCommandOptions` is visible to `Clio.Command.EntitySchemaDesigner` via enclosing-namespace resolution. NSubstitute optional-arg matching: a 4-arg `Resolve` stub stops matching once a 5th param is added unless the stub is updated to the 5-arg form.
Discovery: `LookupRecordExistence` enum ordered `Unknown=0` first so unstubbed substitutes default to the safe (non-blocking) value.
Files: clio/Command/EntitySchemaDesigner/LookupDefaultDisplayValueResolver.cs (new), EntitySchemaDefaultValueConfig.cs, EntitySchemaDefaultValueSourceResolver.cs, RemoteEntitySchemaColumnManager.cs, RemoteEntitySchemaCreator.cs, RemoteEntitySchemaDesignerClient.cs, EntitySchemaDesignerDtos.cs, GetEntitySchemaColumnPropertiesCommand.cs, McpServer/Tools/EntitySchemaTool.cs, McpServer/Prompts/EntitySchemaPrompt.cs, McpServer/Tools/ToolContractGetTool.cs, help/en/{get-entity-schema-column-properties,modify-entity-schema-column}.txt, docs/commands/{...}.md, clio.tests/Command/{LookupDefaultDisplayValueResolverTests(new),RemoteEntitySchemaColumnManagerTests,EntitySchemaDefaultValueSourceResolverTests,RemoteEntitySchemaDesignerClientTests}.cs, clio.mcp.e2e/EntitySchemaToolE2ETests.cs
Impact: AI agents get a single-call machine-verifiable lookup-default readback (source+GUID+ref-schema+display-value) and writes that reject dangling Const lookup GUIDs. Validated: Release build 0 errors/0 CLIO; dotnet test Category=Unit&(Module=Command|Module=McpServer) = 2584 pass. MCP E2E NOT in CI — run the rejection test manually before merge; positive enrichment path already verified live (Story 3). Zero CLI flag changes (CLIO001 surface unchanged).

## 2026-06-15 – ENG-91044 re-open: caption script/culture write guard
Context: ENG-91044 (profile-language detection, PR #682) відтворився. Rollout 019ebbcc показав: `get-user-culture` коректно повернув `en-US` (рядок 66), але агент свідомо (рядок 76 "залишу українською, як у вимозі") поклав кирилицю під ключ `en-US` (`title-localizations:{"en-US":"Номер"}`, app-section caption "Заявки"). Профіль en-US → рендериться en-US-слот з українським текстом. Резолвер НЕ винен — прогалина в тому, що контракт вимагав лише ПРИСУТНІСТЬ `en-US`, але не мову самого тексту.
Decision: (1) Новий статичний `CaptionCultureScriptGuard` (pure, без DI/`new` — стиль EntitySchemaDesignerSupport): hard-fail, коли значення під латинською культурою (allow-list en/de/fr/…) містить не-латинські літери. Асиметрично: під не-латинськими/невідомими культурами — no-op (нуль false-positive; "Email адреса" під uk-UA, акценти de-DE — ОК). (2) Дві write-chokepoints: `EntitySchemaLocalizationContract.NormalizeOptionalLocalizations` (покриває create/update/modify/lookup/sync — title+description) і `ApplicationSectionCreateService.CreateSection` (caption+description проти effectiveCultureName; `--caption-culture` = escape hatch). (3) Посилено настанови (McpServerInstructions, AppModelingGuidanceResource, Entity/Application prompts, GetUserCultureTool desc): культура = мова ТЕКСТУ, не лише ключ; en-US = англійська.
Discovery: `CreateEntitySchemaTool.CreateOptions` викликає `RequireTitleLocalizations` під час СИНХРОННОГО мапінгу аргументів (до env/HTTP) — guard спрацьовує ще до резолву середовища, тож E2E-негатив можливий без живого Creatio (catch → ExitCode 1, повідомлення з en-US). Section caption зберігається plain-text і локалізується server-side під ПРОФІЛЬ (caption-culture для секцій — лише readback), тож валідація проти effectiveCultureName коректна. 3 наявні section-тести (Non_Latin caption + код-генерація) переведено на uk-UA резолвер — caption тепер валідний лише для не-латинського профілю; намір (генерація коду) збережено. `Localizations(enUs, ukUa)` хелпер кладе 1-й арг під en-US — усі наявні виклики передають латиницю, тож не ламаються.
Files: clio/Command/EntitySchemaDesigner/CaptionCultureScriptGuard.cs (new), clio/Command/McpServer/Tools/EntitySchemaLocalizationContract.cs, clio/Command/ApplicationSectionCreateCommand.cs, clio/Command/McpServer/{McpServerInstructions.cs, Resources/AppModelingGuidanceResource.cs, Prompts/EntitySchemaPrompt.cs, Prompts/ApplicationPrompt.cs, Tools/GetUserCultureTool.cs}, clio.tests/Command/{CaptionCultureScriptGuardTests.cs (new), ApplicationSectionCreateServiceTests.cs, McpServer/EntitySchemaLocalizationContractTests.cs (new)}, clio.mcp.e2e/{McpGuidanceResourceE2ETests.cs, EntitySchemaToolE2ETests.cs}, docs/commands/{create-entity-schema,update-entity-schema,modify-entity-schema-column,create-app-section,get-user-culture}.md, help/en/get-user-culture.txt, spec/adr/adr-user-profile-language-detection.md (Rev 4 / Decision 5)
Impact: кирилиця (та інші не-латинські письма) під латинською культурою тепер блокується детерміновано на write-path незалежно від того, чи агент прочитав настанови. Build 0 warnings; Unit (Command|McpServer) 2596 passed. MCP reviewed+updated; E2E додано (guidance-resource + create-entity негатив; e2e не в CI). Commands.md reviewed, no update required (лише індекс).

## 2026-06-15 – ENG-91044: Codex-review fixes + guard розширено на всі caption-шляхи
Context: `/codex:review` PR #701 знайшов 2×P2. Adversarial workflow (3 аудити) підтвердив їх + знайшов 2 script false-positives і 6 негардованих caption-шляхів (coverage-gaps). Користувач обрав повне покриття («Усі 6 шляхів»).
Decision: (Codex P2-1) section-guard валідує проти ПРОФІЛЬНОЇ культури `Resolve(options, null)`, а не readback-override — інакше `--caption-culture uk-UA` + кирилиця при en-US профілі обходили б guard (caption секцій зберігається під профіль). (Codex P2-2) `IsLatinScriptCulture` шанує явний ISO-15924 script-subtag (`az-Cyrl-AZ`→не-латиниця; `az-Latn-AZ`→латиниця) + `parts[1].All(IsAsciiLetter)`. (Script false-pos) `IsLatinLetter` додано Latin-лігатури U+FB00–06 та повноширинну латиницю U+FF21–3A/FF41–5A (точні суб-діапазони, НЕ весь FB00-FB4F — там вірменські/івритські форми). (Coverage) guard розширено на всі 6: create-page + SchemaDesignerHelper(sql/source) + client-unit — валідація проти EFFECTIVE culture (override=storage-key для них, OQ-03 force-knob); update-app-section + create-app — проти ПРОФІЛЮ (override=null; інжект ICaptionCultureResolver у обидва сервіси). DI auto-реєстрація (BindingsModule.cs:709 — кожен Clio.I* інтерфейс) резолвить новий ctor-параметр без правок.
Discovery: КАРДИНАЛЬНЕ правило — валідуй проти культури, під якою значення РЕАЛЬНО зберігається, не readback-override. Для page/sql/source/client-unit override=storage culture (force-language, OQ-03) → валідація проти effective культури коректна (Codex «correctness» по них — хибне спрацювання, це задум). Для section/create-app/update-section caption локалізується server-side під профіль → валідація проти профілю. Agent suggested-fix «весь FB00-FB4F» був ЗАБРОАД (вірменські/івритські лігатури). 3 CLI-команди (sql/source/client-unit) мають try/catch → guard падає чисто; create-app/update-section guard кидає до HTTP.
Files: clio/Command/EntitySchemaDesigner/CaptionCultureScriptGuard.cs, ApplicationSectionCreateCommand.cs, PageCreateOptions.cs, ClientUnitSchemaCreate.cs, SchemaDesignerHelper.cs, ApplicationSectionUpdateCommand.cs, ApplicationCreateService.cs, McpServer/Prompts/ApplicationPrompt.cs; clio.tests/Command/{CaptionCultureScriptGuardTests, ApplicationSectionCreateServiceTests, ApplicationSectionUpdateServiceTests, ApplicationCreateServiceTests, PageCreateCommandTests, SchemaDesignerHelperTests(new)}.cs; clio.mcp.e2e/{McpGuidanceResourceE2ETests, EntitySchemaToolE2ETests}.cs; docs/commands/{create-page,create-sql-schema,create-client-unit-schema,create-schema,update-app-section,create-app}.md; spec/adr/adr-user-profile-language-detection.md (Decision 5 expanded).
Impact: ВСІ caption/name write-шляхи тепер гардовані з культурою, що відповідає фактичному сторейджу. Unit Command 1503 + McpServer 1105 passed (0 fail); build 0 warnings. 6 нових негативних тестів (по шляху) + script-subtag/ligature/fullwidth кейси.

## 2026-06-15 – ENG-91044 PR #701: drive-pr-green (U+00C0 false-positive + Sonar S3267)
Context: drive-pr-green run on PR #701. CI 4/4 green, branch MERGEABLE/CLEAN, but reviewDecision=CHANGES_REQUESTED (b-horodyskyi) + 1 Sonar issue.
Decision: (1) Major false-positive (verified): `Rune.IsLetter` is true for the only three L*-category code points below U+00C0 — ª (U+00AA), µ (U+00B5), º (U+00BA) — so idiomatic Iberian ordinals ("Nº 5"/"1ª Linha" pt-PT/es-ES) and the SI micro prefix ("µm"/"µg/mL" en-US) were hard-rejected. Added `or 0x00AA or 0x00B5 or 0x00BA` to `IsLatinLetter`. (2) Sonar S3267: rewrote `CollectNonLatinLetters` foreach→`EnumerateRunes().Where(...).ToList()`. (3) Minor (using consistency): added `using Clio.Command.EntitySchemaDesigner;` to ClientUnitSchemaCreate.cs/PageCreateOptions.cs/SchemaDesignerHelper.cs and dropped the inline FQNs.
Discovery: ª/µ/º are the ONLY letter-category code points in U+0080–U+00BF, so the 3 singletons fully close the gap without widening the accepted block. The two "test-coverage Major" findings (section profile-vs-override disagreement; create-app/update-section guard fires) were already covered before this round — verified at ApplicationSectionCreateServiceTests:531, ApplicationCreateServiceTests:76, ApplicationSectionUpdateServiceTests:52 — so flagged as confirmed-present, not added.
Files: clio/Command/EntitySchemaDesigner/CaptionCultureScriptGuard.cs, clio/Command/{ClientUnitSchemaCreate,PageCreateOptions,SchemaDesignerHelper}.cs, clio.tests/Command/CaptionCultureScriptGuardTests.cs (+ª/µ/º accept, mixed-script offender, dedup, truncation tests).
Impact: classifier now has zero known false positives below U+00C0; build 0 warnings; CaptionCultureScriptGuard 41 tests + Module=Command 1516 unit tests pass; Sonar S3267 cleared. MCP/docs reviewed — no update required (no contract/option/behavior change; FQN→using is cosmetic, classifier widening only accepts more valid Latin).

## 2026-06-15 12:00 – ENG-91442 hard-reject inline UI-text literals (localizable strings)
Context: Sub-bug під ENG-89871 (Support MMP components). Захоплена сесія Rykhtyk app (експорт session-export-1781263999272) показала: AI-агент через clio MCP `update-page` згенерував `placeholder` як inline-літерали (`name@firm.com`, `https://…`, `e.g. $120k annual`), тоді як `label`/`caption` локалізувались (їхній caption авто з DS-колонки). Гайд `page-schema-resources` ВЖЕ перелічував placeholder/title/tooltip як локалізовувані (з ENG-89649) і GATE у `page-modification` маршрутизував туди, але агент GATE пропустив → настанова описувала, але не примушувала.
Decision: перетворити м'яку настанову на hard-reject. Новий `SchemaValidationService.ValidateLocalizableTextLiterals` (web, читає SCHEMA_VIEW_CONFIG_DIFF) + `ValidateMobileLocalizableTextLiterals` (plain-JSON `viewConfigDiff`), спільний рекурсивний сканер. Відхиляє inline-літерал у властивостях set {label, caption, title, tooltip, placeholder} на будь-якій глибині `values`. Пропускає: non-string (напр. `placeholder:false`), будь-який `$…`-біндинг, та будь-яке значення, що містить `#ResourceString(…)#` (включно з обгорткою `#MacrosTemplateString(#ResourceString(…)#)#`). `description` СВІДОМО виключено (перевантажене ім'я: entity/column/component-метадані). Підключено у 4 точках: PageUpdateTool.ValidateWebPageBody, PageSyncTool.ValidateBody (CollectErrors+IsContentValidationSuccessful), PageValidateTool (record ContentValidationResults+BuildResult), SchemaValidationService.ValidateMobilePage. Guidance: page-schema-resources (секції ENFORCEMENT/CREATION RULE — AC #5 default-language value), page-modification (GATE Why + STOP), три resources `[Description]`, update-page.md/sync-pages.md/help/en/update-page.txt. CAADT (repo creatio-ai-app-development-toolkit, гілка feature/ENG-91442) — один Global Invariant в AGENTS.md (принцип+вказівник на get-guidance page-schema-resources; делегує деталі clio).
Discovery: update-page web-шлях (ValidateWebPageBody) НЕ викликає ValidateInsertedFieldSelfConsistency/ValidateStandardFieldBindings — їх запускають лише sync-pages/validate-page (попри claim у InsertedFieldContractSummary, що insert-контракт "rejected at update-page validation time"); тому новий валідатор підключав явно в усі 4 точки. AppendLabelResourceError ловить лише `$Resources.Strings.X`-нерезолв, inline-літерал label досі проходив. Blast radius у тестах = 1 фікстура (PageToolsTests, `label:"X"`→`$Resources.Strings.UsrName`). CAADT-доки делегують деталі clio (test_default_contract_docs) — інваріант сформульовано без дублювання синтаксису/тулів.
Discovery (drive-pr-green, рев'ю m-dymytrova): верифікація на корпусі 77 реальних production Freedom UI сторінок (через справжній ValidateLocalizableTextLiterals) виявила high-rate false-positive — 345 caption-reject на 43/77 сторінок (56%), з них ~74% — обгортка `#MacrosTemplateString(#ResourceString(Key)#)#`, яку anchored-регекс `^#ResourceString(...)#$` не матчив. Фікс: окремий unanchored `ResourceStringReferencePattern` (`#ResourceString\(([^)]+)\)#`) у IsInlineUserVisibleTextLiteral — приймає macro-reference будь-де (wrapped/concatenated). Re-verify: 345→88 reject на 15 сторінок (усі macro-wrapped FP усунено; залишок 88 — прості літерали на crt.MenuItem/crt.SearchFilter, лишені на окреме scope-обговорення). ResourceStringPattern (anchored) НЕ чіпав — його використовує TryGetMacroResourceKey для inserted-field перевірки.
Files: clio/Command/SchemaValidationService.cs, clio/Command/McpServer/Tools/{PageUpdateTool,PageSyncTool,PageValidateTool}.cs, clio/Command/McpServer/Resources/{PageSchemaResourcesGuidanceResource,PageModificationGuidanceResource}.cs, clio/docs/commands/{update-page,sync-pages}.md, clio/help/en/update-page.txt, clio.tests/Command/McpServer/{SchemaValidationServiceTests,McpGuidanceResourceTests,PageToolsTests}.cs, clio.mcp.e2e/{PageUpdate,PageSync,PageValidate}ToolE2ETests.cs; CAADT: AGENTS.md
Impact: AI більше не може зберегти сторінку з захардкодженим user-visible текстом — баг закрито на рівні enforcement, не лише настанови. Build 0 warnings/0 new CLIO*. Unit McpServer+Command 2583 passed/0 failed (+14 localizable-text, incl. MacrosTemplateString wrapper/concatenated/no-resource boundary/mobile). E2E додано для update-page(dry-run)/sync-pages/validate-page (не в CI). MCP reviewed: authoring-контракт не змінився (фікс лише розширює розпізнавання вже-локалізованих форм) → no update required.

## 2026-06-15 – ENG-91540: create-app-section insert budget must beat the MCP client request ceiling
Context: Sub-bug під ENG-90679 (Ready to Test). `create-task-section` ADAC-тест ВСЕ ЩЕ відтворював `MCP error -32001: Request timed out` (транскрипт run_20260615_115134: 4 таймаути рівно по ~180с, агент здався і зробив секцію вручну через odata-create SysModuleEntity/SysModule/SysModuleInWorkplace). ENG-90679 (класифікація transport/creatio-timeout/server-error + readback) і ENG-91274 (progress-heartbeat) обидва коректні, але НЕ спрацьовують для цього клієнта.
Decision: знизити дефолтний insert-бюджет `DefaultInsertTimeoutMs` 300_000→90_000 і `VerificationTimeoutMs` 30_000→20_000 у ApplicationSectionCreateService. Бюджет тепер ГАРАНТОВАНО спрацьовує раніше за стелю клієнта, тож clio віддає структурований creatio-timeout envelope (error-class/section-created/retry-guidance) замість опак `-32001`. `CLIO_CREATE_SECTION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` лишається для підняття бюджету (patient-клієнти / великі стенди). Альтернативи (120/30 — тонший запас; async fire-and-poll — ADR відхилив, ламає синхронний AI-контракт) відкинуто; вибір 90/20 узгоджено з Alex.
Discovery: (1) Корінь — НЕузгодженість двох стель: clio-бюджет (300с) > жорсткої per-request стелі MCP-клієнта (Copilot CLI ~180с). Heartbeat (ENG-91274) НЕ рятує: клієнт або не шле progressToken (beat=null, тиша), або має hard ceiling, який progress не скидає (ADR прямо припускав протилежне — "clients reset timeout on progress"). Тому graceful-шлях ENG-90679 ніколи не встигав. (2) MCP-поверхня (prompt/resources/tool-contract) описує бюджет АБСТРАКТНО ("no response within the budget") — хардкоду "300" немає → MCP reviewed, no contract change. (3) clio.mcp.e2e БАЧИТЬ internal-члени clio (InternalsVisibleTo), але `ApplicationSectionCreateService` у неймспейсі `Clio.Command` (не `…McpServer.Tools`) → потрібен явний `using Clio.Command;` (heartbeat-const працював бо McpProgressHeartbeat у Tools). (4) Faithful creatio-timeout E2E НЕможливий у поточному harness: blackhole-endpoint вішається в НЕобмеженому prep (GetApplicationInfo/ResolveRandomIconId/CheckEntitySchema*) ДО insert-бюджету; треба програмований стаб (respond-to-prep, hang-on-insert). Timeout-класи лишаються детерміновано покритими unit-тестами; додано лише env-var-plumbing E2E. (5) Residual: prep-читання досі unbounded (окремий get-app-info perf — ENG-91316).
Files: clio/Command/ApplicationSectionCreateCommand.cs (DefaultInsertTimeoutMs 90_000, VerificationTimeoutMs 20_000, XML-doc + rationale-коментар); clio.tests/Command/ApplicationSectionCreateServiceTests.cs (3 assertions 300_000→90_000); clio.tests/Command/McpServer/ApplicationToolTests.cs (sample msg 300s→90s); clio.mcp.e2e/ApplicationSectionToolE2ETests.cs (+Honor_Insert_Budget_Override_Env_Var, +using Clio.Command); clio/docs/commands/create-app-section.md; clio/help/en/create-app-section.txt; spec/create-app-section-timeout-diagnostics/{spec,plan}.md (+ENG-91540 блок, AC9-11).
Impact: агент отримує actionable creatio-timeout-guidance ("wait, then list-app-sections") замість сліпого retry-loop на `-32001`; секція, що матеріалізується server-side через хвилину, знаходиться через list-app-sections. Build clean (0 errors, лише pre-existing CS0114/CS8600/CS8625 у нечіпаних файлах). Targeted unit: Command|McpServer 2683 passed/26 skipped/0 failed; focused ApplicationSection*/ApplicationTool 115/115. MCP reviewed: tool args/contract/destructive-flags/envelope-поля незмінні — лише внутрішня дефолт-константа → no MCP contract update required.

## 2026-06-15 – ENG-91540: drive-pr-green review fixes (PR #703)
Context: PR #703 уже APPROVED/MERGEABLE/CLEAN, Sonar 0, CI зелений, 0 review-threads — але top-level рев'ю b-horodyskyi (creatio-code-review Mode 2) лишило 4 Minor-зауваження без реакції автора. drive-pr-green опрацьовує їх перед merge.
Decision: виправлено всі 4. (1) E2E `Honor_Insert_Budget_Override_Env_Var` переобіцяв — проти `http://127.0.0.1:9` фейл класифікується як transport ДО insert-бюджету, тож тест ніколи не ганяв сам бюджет. Пом'якшено Description/AllureName/inline-коментар до того, що реально перевіряється (spawned-процес приймає override env-var і досі віддає classified envelope), асерти посилено до `error-class=="transport"` + `section-created=="false"` (як у сусідньому transport-тесті). (2) Додано unit `CreateSection_Should_Pass_Bounded_Readback_Timeout_When_Insert_Times_Out_But_Section_Is_Visible` — захоплює timeout post-timeout readback'у і асертить ==20_000 (AC9 readback-половина була без прямого асерту). (3) qa.md: TC-U-1/TC-U-3 300_000→90_000, +TC-U-23 на 20s readback. (4) Раціональний коментар біля констант (новий у цьому PR) переобіцяв "full response under ~120s" — переформульовано: бюджети bound лише dominant insert+readback span на not-visible шляху; prep-читання і recovery GetApplicationInfo-poll НЕ обмежені (ENG-91316).
Discovery: readback-бюджет (VerificationTimeoutMs) тече у два місця — `TryVerifySectionExists` SelectQuery (605) і recovery `LoadCreatedSection(...,VerificationTimeoutMs)`→GetSectionRecord/SetIconBackground; обидва 20s, тож capture останнього виклику в `SetUpTimedOutInsertWithReadbackMocks` (readback-стаб із SectionSchemaUId) стабільно дає 20_000. Threading readback-таймауту в `IApplicationInfoService.GetApplicationInfo` (щоб recovery-loop був реально bounded) — свідомо follow-up ENG-91316, не в цьому PR. Production-поведінка не змінена (константи ті самі) → MCP reviewed, no update required.
Files: clio.mcp.e2e/ApplicationSectionToolE2ETests.cs, clio.tests/Command/ApplicationSectionCreateServiceTests.cs, clio/Command/ApplicationSectionCreateCommand.cs (лише коментар), spec/create-app-section-timeout-diagnostics/create-app-section-timeout-diagnostics-qa.md
Impact: рев'ю-знахідки закрито без зміни поведінки; тести тепер чесно описують покриття, AC9 readback-половина має прямий асерт, QA-план узгоджено з 90/20. Build clean (0 errors); Module=Command 1537 passed/25 skipped/0 failed; clio.mcp.e2e компілюється (0 errors).

## 2026-06-15 – ENG-91540 PR #703 round 2: 2-й людський рев'юер (tetiana-moshon, CHANGES_REQUESTED)
Context: після пушу round-1 (bc41648c) reviewDecision злетів APPROVED→CHANGES_REQUESTED — паралельно зайшов 2-й людський рев'юер tetiana-moshon (creatio-code-review Mode 2) з тим самим E2E-тестом, але оцінкою **Major** (+inline-тред на ApplicationSectionToolE2ETests.cs:165). Її Major: тест проти 127.0.0.1:9 не ганяє бюджет (transport класифікується ДО нього), назва `Should_Honor_Insert_Budget_Override_Env_Var` і env-var рядок оманливі/dead-config. round-1-пом'якшення (softened desc + tightened asserts) було НЕповним — лишило оманливу назву і dead env-var.
Decision: видалити надлишковий E2E-тест повністю (tetiana опція (b), доведена до висновку — прибирання dead-config env-var робить його буквальним дублем `Should_Return_Transport_Classified_Error_For_Unreachable_Environment`). Опція (a) faithful creatio-timeout E2E відхилена: `GetApplicationInfo` (ApplicationInfoService.cs, 924 рядки) робить багато SelectQuery+RuntimeEntitySchemaRequest → faithful-стаб = застабити весь prep + hang на insert + flaky timing-асерти; непропорційно для проєкту поза CI на approved bugfix. Бюджет-firing лишається детерміновано покритим unit-тестами. Прибрано й тепер-unused `using Clio.Command;`. Finding 2 (rationale-коментар) — допрацьовано: явно сказано що бюджети bound insert-виклик(90s)+recovery-readback(20s), але НЕ end-to-end (success-path readback Timeout.Infinite, 15-спробний poll без сукупного дедлайну, prep — ENG-91316).
Discovery: VerificationTimeoutMs 30→20 (tetiana Finding 3 Minor — радить лишити 30s, бо 90+30=120<180 і 20s лише ріже diagnostic-вікно→більше `section-created:unknown`) — НЕ змінюю: 90/20 раніше узгоджено з Alex; зберегти=виконати його рішення, відкотити=одностороннє скасування. Виношу на розгляд Alex у звіті (Minor-рекомендація, не блокер). Finding 4 (informational, slow-stands behavioral change) — flag release notes, без code-зміни. Двоє людських рев'юерів зайшли з різницею ~33 хв (b-horodyskyi 14:45 APPROVED, tetiana 15:19 CHANGES_REQUESTED) на одну знахідку, але різної ваги — варто чекати на агентів/рев'юерів після пушу (Step 9 drive-pr-green).
Files: clio.mcp.e2e/ApplicationSectionToolE2ETests.cs (видалено тест + using), clio/Command/ApplicationSectionCreateCommand.cs (rationale-коментар round 2)
Impact: Major закрито без зміни поведінки; жодного оманливого green-тесту; коментар точний. Build 0 errors; Module=Command 1537/0; clio.mcp.e2e 0 errors. Залишок на Alex: 20s vs 30s VerificationTimeoutMs.

## 2026-06-15 – ENG-91540 PR #703 round 3: revert VerificationTimeoutMs 20→30 (Alex decision)
Context: винесений на Alex пункт (tetiana Finding 3) — Alex обрав відкотити readback-бюджет на 30s. Тобто PR тепер змінює ЛИШЕ DefaultInsertTimeoutMs 300→90; VerificationTimeoutMs лишається 30_000 (= master, PR його більше не чіпає).
Decision: 30s по всіх 9 посиланнях. Source: ApplicationSectionCreateCommand.cs (const 20_000→30_000, rationale-коментар "(20 s)"→"(30 s)"). Test: ApplicationSectionCreateServiceTests.cs (новий readback-тест assert+because+Description 20→30 — тест лишається валідним: верифікує що VerificationTimeoutMs тече в recovery readback vs success-path Timeout.Infinite). ## 2026-06-15 21:06 – mcp-server: ObjectDisposedException на чистому EOF-shutdown
Context: `clio mcp-server` падав з unhandled System.ObjectDisposedException при закритті stdin (EOF). EOF — легітимний сигнал завершення stdio-транспорту, має давати exit 0, а не краш.
Decision: У McpServerCommand.Execute інлайн-лямбди Console.CancelKeyPress/AppDomain.ProcessExit замінено на делегати-змінні з дискардами, які відписуються у `finally` ДО dispose CTS; guarded-cancel винесено в `internal static RequestShutdown(CancellationTokenSource)`, що ковтає ObjectDisposedException. Belt-and-suspenders: відписка усуває виклик у happy-path, guard ловить будь-який race.
Discovery: Стек `<Execute>b__1` = 2-га лямбда = ProcessExit-хендлер; `using var cts` диспозиться на виході з Execute, а ProcessExit фає ПІСЛЯ → Cancel() на disposed CTS. mcp-server — host-верб, НЕ MCP-tool (немає Tools/Prompts/Resources обгортки, лише побіжний коментар у PageOutputDirectoryResolver.cs) → MCP review N/A. Docs вже декларують «runs until the stdin stream is closed» → фікс приводить реалізацію у відповідність → docs no update required. Іменовані локальні функції з невикористаними params дають CS0168 — делегати-змінні з `(_, _)` чистіші.
Files: clio/Command/McpServer/McpServerCommand.cs, clio.tests/Command/McpServer/McpServerCommandTests.cs
Impact: Чистий shutdown агентського MCP-процесу (Claude Code/Copilot закривають stdin на виході) більше не лишає unhandled exception. Build 0 warnings у моїх файлах (CS0168 у Package/PackageDownloader.cs:93 — передіснуючий). Unit Module=McpServer 1185 passed/1 skip (+3 RequestShutdown). Реальне репро на Release-бінарнику: initialize→EOF дає exit 0 без ObjectDisposedException.

## 2026-06-16 00:00 – Fix new-pkg crash (issue #674) by removing CreateCommand reflection helper
Context: GitHub issue #674 — `clio new-pkg <name>` fails with "[ERR] - Constructor on type 'Clio.Command.ReferenceCommand' not found." ILogger was added to ReferenceCommand ctor during a refactor but the `CreateCommand<T>` call sites in Program.cs were not updated. Root cause is `CreateCommand<T>` = `Activator.CreateInstance(typeof(T), args)`: the call site hand-lists ctor args with no compile/DI safety, so ctor arity drift breaks at runtime.
Decision: Instead of patching the args, eliminate the legacy pre-DI `CreateCommand<T>` helper entirely and route the 3 call sites (UnregAppCommand, ReferenceCommand, NewPkgCommand) through `Resolve<T>()` like the ~100 other commands. `CreateRemoteCommand<T>` left intact on purpose — it manually builds CreatioClient/adapter from settings (EnvironmentScoped concern), a separate riskier change.
Discovery: ReferenceCommand & NewPkgCommand were NOT DI-registered (UnregAppCommand was, yet still hand-constructed — pure redundancy). Registered ReferenceCommand + `Command<ReferenceOptions>→ReferenceCommand` (NewPkgCommand's base-type dep) + NewPkgCommand in BindingsModule. MS DI picks ReferenceCommand's 3-arg ctor since System.IO.Abstractions.IFileSystem is registered (BindingsModule:198) — behavior-equivalent to the 2-arg ctor which just `new`s a real FileSystem. `Resolve<UnregAppCommand>()` is called WITHOUT passing opts (UnregAppOptions is EnvironmentOptions; passing it would flip container to EnvironmentScoped — unwanted for offline unregister; matches RegisterCommand precedent). Replaced the earlier Activator-mirroring regression tests with container-resolution tests (`new BindingsModule().Register(...)` → GetRequiredService) — strictly stronger: catches arity drift AND missing registration (the new failure mode). Verified end-to-end: `new-pkg abc` → `[INF] - Done`, `ref-to src` → `Done`. Full unit suite: 4028 passed / 0 failed / 20 skipped.
Files: clio/Program.cs (removed CreateCommand helper + unused `using Clio.Project`), clio/BindingsModule.cs, clio.tests/Command/NewPkgCommand.Tests.cs
Impact: Pure DI-wiring refactor; command behavior/options/output unchanged → no docs or MCP surface changes needed. Pattern: never reach for Activator-based command construction — register + Resolve. Removing call-site ctor-arg enumeration kills the arity-drift bug class; residual "not registered" risk is covered by container-resolution tests.

## 2026-06-16 12:00 – Remove last MediatR usage from ExternalLink deep-link path
Context: Clio is removing MediatR. ExternalLinkCommand.Execute was the last production code calling _mediator.Send; this unit replaces MediatR dispatch with an explicit Type-keyed handler dispatcher. Package teardown (AddMediatR/ValidationBehaviour/package ref) is a separate follow-up unit and was intentionally left in place.
Decision: Option A — keep the reflection runtimeType discovery + Activator.CreateInstance + ExternalLinkOptionsValidator unchanged; only replace the dispatch. New internal interface IExternalLinkHandler { Type RequestType; Task Handle(IExternalLink); }. IExternalLink no longer extends MediatR IRequest. All 7 handlers converted from IRequestHandler<T> to IExternalLinkHandler (RequestType => typeof(T); Handle drops CancellationToken; `return Unit.Task;` → `return Task.CompletedTask;`). IisScannerHandler additionally injects IValidator<IISScannerRequest> and calls _validator.ValidateAndThrow((IISScannerRequest)request) as first Handle line to preserve what MediatR's ValidationBehaviour did. ExternalLinkCommand injects IEnumerable<IExternalLinkHandler>, builds FirstOrDefault(h.RequestType==runtimeType) lookup, defensive no-match guard → WriteError + return 1.
Discovery: CS0051 trap — IExternalLinkHandler/IExternalLink are internal, so a *public* ExternalLinkCommand ctor taking IEnumerable<IExternalLinkHandler> is illegal (inconsistent accessibility), and MS DI auto-resolution only picks public ctors. Fix: made the ctor `internal` AND replaced `services.AddTransient<ExternalLinkCommand>()` with an explicit factory lambda `sp => new ExternalLinkCommand(sp.GetServices<IExternalLinkHandler>(), ...)`. Factory bypasses the public-ctor reflection and the `new` is composition-root wiring (same category as LazyDataProvider). Keep both interfaces internal — making them public to dodge this is an architect decision. Also: injecting IEnumerable eagerly constructs all 7 handlers on resolve (MediatR resolved one lazily by type); harmless here because BaseClioModuleTests composes the full BindingsModule so every handler dep resolves. RegisterFluentValidators (BindingsModule:728) auto-registers IValidator<IISScannerRequest>→ISSScannerValidator, so the IisScannerHandler injection resolves without explicit registration. Migrated/renamed test file to ExternalLinkCommandDispatch.Tests.cs; fixed 3 handler-level test files calling old Handle(req, CancellationToken) / new IisScannerHandler(...) ctor.
Files: clio/Requests/IExternalLinkHandler.cs (new), clio/Requests/IExternalLink.cs, clio/Requests/RegisterEnvironment.cs, clio/Requests/UnregisterEnvironment.cs, clio/Requests/OpenUrl.cs, clio/Requests/GetAppSettingsFilePath.cs, clio/Requests/RegisterOAuthCredentials.cs, clio/Requests/Restart .cs, clio/Requests/IISScannerRequest.cs, clio/BindingsModule.cs, clio/Command/ExternalLink.cs, clio.tests/Command/ExternalLinkCommandDispatch.Tests.cs (renamed from ExternalLinkCommand.MediatorIntegration.Tests.cs), clio.tests/Requests/RegisterEnvironmentHandlerTests.cs, clio.tests/Requests/UnregisterEnvironmentHandlerTests.cs, clio.tests/Requests/IISScannerHandler.Tests.cs
Impact: externalLink verb/options/observable behavior unchanged (validate → dispatch → 0/1) → no docs/MCP changes. This is the LAST MediatR USAGE removed; only the package + AddMediatR + ValidationBehaviour remain for the next teardown unit. Targeted Category=Unit&(Module=Command|Module=Requests): 1633 passed / 0 failed / 11 skipped.

## 2026-06-16 13:30 – Teardown: uninstall MediatR package + remove all residue (FINAL unit)
Context: All MediatR usage was already migrated in prior units (ExternalLink dispatch, scenario handlers, etc.). Only inert residue remained: ValidationBehaviour pipeline, BaseHandlerRequest's IRequest marker, the AddMediatR DI block, and the package references. This unit removes ALL of it so the solution builds/tests green with ZERO MediatR references.
Decision: (1) Deleted clio/Requests/ValidationBehaviour.cs (IPipelineBehavior — only registered via AddOpenBehavior, nothing else referenced it). (2) clio/Common/ScenarioHandlers/BaseHandlerRequest.cs: dropped `: IRequest<OneOf<...>>` + `using MediatR;` + now-unused `using OneOf;`; kept plain class with Arguments dict (derived scenario requests already use explicit handler interfaces). (3) BindingsModule.cs: removed the `services.AddMediatR(cfg => { RegisterServicesFromAssembly; AddOpenBehavior(ValidationBehaviour<,>); })` block; kept `using Clio.Requests;` (still needed by IExternalLinkHandler registrations). (4) Reworded the stale "Replaces the MediatR IRequestHandler" comment in IExternalLinkHandler.cs. (5) Removed `<PackageReference Include="MediatR" />` from clio.csproj and `<PackageVersion Include="MediatR" Version="[12.5.0]"/>` from Directory.Packages.props.
Discovery: BindingsModule had no `using MediatR;` import — `AddMediatR` resolved via MediatR's extension in the MS DI namespace, so removing the call + package was sufficient (no using to strip there). clio.tests had ZERO MediatR references after prior units — nothing to clean. OneOf is a SEPARATE package and stays (used elsewhere). Clean build with 0 warnings/0 errors WITHOUT the MediatR package is the compile-time proof that no reference remains.
Files: clio/Requests/ValidationBehaviour.cs (deleted), clio/Common/ScenarioHandlers/BaseHandlerRequest.cs, clio/BindingsModule.cs, clio/Requests/IExternalLinkHandler.cs, clio/clio.csproj, Directory.Packages.props, CONTRIBUTING.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, project-context.md
Impact: MediatR is fully GONE from clio/ and clio.tests/ (package uninstalled). Docs/instructions updated from "deprecated/being removed" to "removed". Full unit suite: 4031 passed / 0 failed / 20 skipped. New commands: Command<TOptions> + DI services only.

## 2026-06-16 – Modernization pilot: UnzipRequestHandler
Context: Pilot for "modernize while we touch a file" playbook on clio/Common/ScenarioHandlers/Unzip.cs.
Decision: Fixed inverted dir-creation (line 88 created dir only when it already existed); injected System.IO.Abstractions.IFileSystem into handler (aliased as IAbstractionsFileSystem to avoid clash with Clio.Common.IFileSystem in same namespace); routed Directory/Path ops + zip File.OpenRead through it; kept entry.ExtractToFile concrete (integration-tested); justified both CLIO002 pragmas with comments; kept ValidateAndThrow sync.
Discovery: Unqualified IFileSystem in Clio.Common.* resolves to Clio.Common.IFileSystem, NOT System.IO.Abstractions — must alias (neighbors use IAbstractionsFileSystem). System.IO.Abstractions.IFileSystem already registered unconditionally (BindingsModule.cs:198). Validator still uses concrete System.IO.File.Exists, so handler tests need the source zip BOTH as a real temp touch (validator) AND seeded into MockFileSystem (handler). Bug-fix test must use an EMPTY zip so the extraction loop's else-branch CreateDirectory can't mask the inverted line-88 bug.
Files: clio/Common/ScenarioHandlers/Unzip.cs, clio.tests/Requests/UnzipHandlerTests.cs
Impact: Establishes the modernize-on-touch pattern; UnzipRequestValidator IFileSystem conversion left as follow-up.

## 2026-06-16 – Unzip handler: replace hand-rolled spinner with ILogger spinner
Context: Amends in-progress modernize-unzip pilot; replace custom Console spinner in UnzipRequestHandler.
Decision: Inject Clio.Common.ILogger; wrap extraction in BeginSpinner/try-finally(EndSpinner(success))/EndSpinner. Dropped async -> Task.FromResult (no await left). Removed Turn(), _sequence, _counter, all Console.* and both CLIO002 pragmas; removed now-unused `using System;`.
Discovery: ConsoleLogger spinner only no-ops when Console.IsOutputRedirected; tests must inject NullLogger via AdditionalRegistrations (applied after base ILogger reg at BindingsModule.cs:643, last-wins) to stay deterministic cross-OS.
Files: clio/Common/ScenarioHandlers/Unzip.cs, clio.tests/Requests/UnzipHandlerTests.cs
Impact: Reference for migrating other hand-rolled Console spinners to the ILogger spinner; shows DI-override pattern to neutralize spinner in command/handler tests.

## 2026-06-15 09:56 – ENG-89424 telemetry: rename to "telemetry" vocabulary + reliability/security hardening
Context: Deep review of the ENG-89424 telemetry flusher (clio + creatio-ai-app-development-toolkit). User asked to rename the MCP tools/domain off "measurements" with NO back-compat alias, and apply the gating fixes.
Decision: Full internal rename Measurement* -> Telemetry* across both repos. Tools: send-measurements -> send-telemetry, get-measurements-consent -> get-telemetry-consent (clean break, no alias). Types: MeasurementService->TelemetryService, MeasurementRequest->TelemetryEventRequest, MeasurementResult->TelemetryEventResult, MeasurementConsentResult->TelemetryConsentResult, MeasurementError->TelemetryError, MeasurementSessionState->TelemetrySessionState, MeasurementFlush{Service,Scheduler,Options,OptionsProvider}->TelemetryFlush*. Storage records (OpenTelemetry*/Otlp*) left as-is (format names). Rename done via ordered case-sensitive literal script (longest-token-first) on telemetry-only + shared files, then git mv. Fixes folded in: (1) TelemetryService.Send wraps persistence in try/catch(IOException/UnauthorizedAccess/Security) -> soft TelemetryEventResult(false,"store-failed","storage-unavailable"), added optional ILogger; (2) flusher PruneSessions() prunes sessions/ by mtime age+size cap every run; (4) 4xx permanent-rejection now LogWarning + 200-char response-body snippet; (6) IsValidEndpoint = https OR loopback http only (blocks ingest key over cleartext to remote); (9) telemetry root now <clio-home>/telemetry via ClioRuntimePaths.Home (honors CLIO_HOME) instead of ~/.creatio-ai-app-development-toolkit; (11) WireJsonOptions PropertyNamingPolicy=CamelCase belt-and-suspenders; (12) ITelemetryService now Singleton (was Transient) to match flusher lifetime; (13) removed leaked http://caadt-telemetry.localtest.me endpoint from appsettings.json; duration_ms removed from get-tool-contract advertised input/example (still accepted+inferred) to match CAADT payload. New tests: storage-write-fails soft result, sessions prune, https/loopback endpoint guard, strict OTLP camelCase wire-shape assertion in flush E2E. Docs: mcp-server.md + help/en/mcp-server.txt (names, storage location, CLIO_TELEMETRY_HOME, retention/PII). CAADT: product-telemetry.md, SKILL.md, rules/*.mdc, AGENTS.md, ADR, install.py, test_product_telemetry_contract.py renamed.
Discovery: clio/appsettings.json is NOT shipped (no csproj Content entry) and not seeded by SettingsBootstrapService (reads %LOCALAPPDATA%); the localtest.me endpoint was dead/leaked config. ClioRuntimePaths.Home == SettingsRepository.AppSettingsFolderPath is the consolidated home (NOT ~/.clio). A blanket "measurement"->"telemetry" replace mangles plural "measurements"->"telemetrys" and "telemetry measurement"->"telemetry telemetry"; fixed with targeted phrase replacements. Uri.IsLoopback is name-based (127.0.0.1/localhost true; caadt-telemetry.localtest.me false) so the E2E stub on 127.0.0.1 still passes the new guard.

## 2026-06-15 11:20 – ENG-89424 telemetry: full open-issue + allow-list hardening
Context: After the rename + first fixes, addressed the entire remaining open-issue list (incl. the event allow-list announcement question) on the telemetry feature.
Decision: (allow-list single source of truth) TelemetryService.AllowedEventNames is now an internal ORDERED IReadOnlyList (CAADT order) + private HashSet for O(1) Contains; get-tool-contract's event_name description is generated from it (string.Join), and a clio unit test (GetToolContract_Should_Announce_All_Enforced_Event_Names) asserts the announced list == enforced list so they cannot drift. (security/value guards) ValidateRequest now bounds session_id (regex ^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]+$, <=128) and caps coding_agent/skill/plugin_version (<=64) -> codes invalid-session-id / field-too-long. (collision) session-state filename is now SHA-256 hex of the session id (collision-free + traversal-safe) instead of lossy char-replace. (atomicity) WriteJson is temp+Move(overwrite) atomic; GetOrCreateInstallationId is create-only Move (first-writer-wins) with read-back on race; installation-id churn under concurrent clio processes eliminated. (tmp reaper) flusher PruneTmp reaps crash-orphaned events/*.json.tmp older than MaxTmpAge=24h (by filename timestamp). (endpoint log) TelemetryFlushOptionsProvider got an optional ILogger and logs Warning when a configured endpoint is rejected (https/loopback) so it no longer looks "unconfigured". (OTLP) added severityNumber (9=INFO) to OtlpLogRecord/BuildOtlpPayload. (ADR) created spec/adr/adr-product-telemetry.md documenting storage-vs-wire split, https-only, loss-tolerant drop, storage location, value guards, and the ENG-89424 AC descope (result/entry_point/model/model_reasoning); fixed the CAADT ADR's "no intermediate re-mapping" line. (schema) added telemetry property + telemetrysettings definition to tpl/jsonschema/schema.json.tpl AND fixed the pre-existing stray ']' (validated via ConvertFrom-Json). (contract polish) send-telemetry description now notes background upload; coding_agent example aligned to CAADT ("Claude Code, Codex, GitHub Copilot CLI, or Cursor").
Discovery: get-tool-contract already announced the allow-list (field description + enum validator) but as a hand-maintained prose copy separate from the enforcement set (4 copies total, no sync test). NSubstitute recursive mock: fileSystem.File.When(...).Do(throw) drives the SUT's _fileSystem.File. IFile.Move has a 3-arg overwrite overload and a 2-arg create-only (throws if dest exists) — used for atomic overwrite vs first-writer-wins respectively. ConvertFrom-Json is a good last-mile validator for the schema tpl edit.

## 2026-06-15 13:30 – ENG-89424 telemetry: status token "stored" -> "recorded" (mechanism-free)
Context: Review feedback — send-telemetry returning "stored" reads like "delivered", and (since nothing is published yet) the success status should describe the contract outcome, not the storage mechanism, so the buffering/sending strategy can change without a contract change.
Decision: Renamed the success status "stored" -> "recorded" (TelemetryService.StatusStored -> StatusRecorded) and the local-I/O soft failure "store-failed"/"storage-unavailable" -> "record-failed"/"record-unavailable" (mechanism-free; "recorded" also matches the CAADT contract's own verb "treat telemetry as recorded"). Updated SendTelemetryTool gating check, get-tool-contract status-field description (now spells out recorded/consent-denied/record-failed/rejected and that upload is separate+unconfirmed; previously omitted the failure status), event_id description, the clio ADR decision 6 (status vocabulary rationale), and tests (mock returns + assertions). Avoided "spooled"/"stored-locally"/"queued"/"accepted": first three leak mechanism, "accepted" can be misread as collector-side acceptance.
Discovery: The flush-schedule unit test depends on the mock returning the exact StatusRecorded value (tool gates flush on result.Status == StatusRecorded), so mock returns had to change too. Behavior-prose uses of "stored/store/storage" (e.g. "stored events are uploaded", round-trip test name) are left as-is — only the status TOKEN + its contract descriptions changed.
